chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1225 of 2011 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For katcha peshi. 07-02-2018 Mr. Ghulamullah Chang advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto A.A.G. Sindh. Syed Meeral Shah Additional Prosecutor General Sindh. Through this petition, the main grievance of the petitioner is that the official respondents are not going to arrest the absconders (their names mentioned in the memo of petition) in different cases, and according to him, the concerned police officials may be directed to arrest the absconders and produce them before the Court of law if they are actually involved in any criminal case. Learned A.A.G. and A.P.G. submit that the official respondents would act strictly in accordance with law, if the alleged absconders are involved in any criminal case. In view of the above, this constitutional petition stands disposed of with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and arrest the absconding accused if they are actually involved in any criminal case and produce them before the respective Courts. Office is directed to supply the copy of this order to the learned A.A.G. for compliance. Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
